sql.if: and ( name like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or group_name like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or organizer like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') )
and ( name like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or group_name like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or organizer like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') )

mapper.select:
select * from activity where is_accepted = 1
order by hot desc, id desc
select * from activity where is_accepted = 1 order by hot desc, id desc limit 5
mapper.insert: insert into individual_activity ( activity_id, user_id, position, status ) values ( #{activityId}, #{studentId}, '成员', #{status} )
mapper.select: select id, activity_id, user_id as student_id, status from individual_activity where activity_id = #{activityId} and user_id = #{studentId} limit 1
select count(1) from individual_activity where activity_id = #{activityId} and (status is null or status != -1)
select a.* from activity a inner join individual_activity ia on a.id = ia.activity_id where ia.user_id = #{studentId} and ia.status = 1 order by a.time desc, a.id desc
select ia.*, u.user_name, u.email, u.phone from individual_activity ia left join `user` u on ia.user_id = u.user_id where ia.activity_id = #{activityId} order by ia.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into activity ( name, organizer, image, description, attachment, hot, arrange, time, number, place, type, group_name, create_user, create_time, modify_user, modify_time, is_accepted ) values ( #{name}, #{organizer}, #{image}, #{description}, #{attachment}, #{hot}, #{arrange}, #{time}, #{number}, #{place}, #{type}, #{groupName}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{modifyUser}, #{modifyTime}, #{isAccepted} )
mapper.update: update activity set description = #{description}, attachment = #{attachment}, image = #{image}, modify_time = now() where group_name = #{groupName}
update activity set attachment = #{attachment}, modify_time = now() where name = #{name}
update activity set image = #{image}, modify_time = now() where name = #{name}
mapper.select: select * from activity where id = #{id} limit 1

select * from activity where 1 = 1
order by id desc
select * from activity where group_name = #{groupName} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update activity set is_accepted = 1, modify_time = now() where id = #{activityId}
update activity set is_accepted = 0, modify_time = now() where id = #{activityId}

update activity set name = #{name}, organizer = #{organizer}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, attachment = #{attachment}, hot = #{hot}, arrange = #{arrange}, time = #{time}, number = #{number}, place = #{place}, type = #{type}, group_name = #{groupName}, modify_user = #{modifyUser}, modify_time = now(), is_accepted = #{isAccepted} where id = #{id}
